description: A property manager needs to perform a semi-annual inspection of a rental property.

nodes.task_description: Notify the tenant of the upcoming inspection, providing at least 24 hours' notice as required by law.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a compliant and professional notice to the tenant.

nodes.task_description: Use a mobile app to conduct the inspection, following a standardized checklist (e.g., check smoke detectors, look for leaks).

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the inspection checklist, taking photos of any issues.

nodes.task_description: Generate an inspection report and create work orders for any identified maintenance issues.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a report and creates necessary work orders.
